meta.note: Three-tile model. Each paragraph = 3 tiles. SHARED pools reused by every type. TYPE-LOCKED pools (hinge, aim, body key-pools, verdict) live inside each type and guarantee a coherent essay. bodyPlan declares which key-pool feeds body slot 1, 2, 3 — this makes the engine type-agnostic.

tileRules.signpost: SHARED. Position-tagged first|addition|turn; randomise within bucket.
tileRules.view: SHARED. flavour generalisation for argument types, opinion for opinion essays.
tileRules.support: SHARED. Hidden Reason/Example/Result/Contrast/Compare — surfaces as the asterisk footnote.
tileRules.hinge: TYPE-LOCKED. The link word the title pulls toward (B move).
tileRules.bodyPlan: TYPE-LOCKED. 3 pool-names, one per body line.

background: There is a growing recognition that ...
It is a well-established fact that ...
Over the past few years there has been a significant increase in ...

opinion: it is my sincere belief that
as far as I can judge,
it is important to acknowledge that

aim: Hence, it is vital to analyse the benefits and drawbacks of ...
Therefore, it is vitally important to consider the advantages and disadvantages of ...
Consequently, it is essential that we study the arguments in favour and against ...
Therefore, it is vital that we analyse the pros and cons of ...

keyFor: the main argument in favour of ...

stance: as far as I can judge,
verdict: the advantages of ... outweigh the disadvantages.
despite some of the views expressed, the benefits of ... are enormous.
even though there are concerns about ..., there should be ...
the positive aspects of ... outweigh the drawbacks.

aim: Hence, it is vital to examine the main problems and explore practical solutions to ...
Therefore, it is important to identify the key difficulties and discuss effective measures for ...
Consequently, this essay will consider the problems caused by ... and suggest ways to address them.
Therefore, it is essential that we understand the causes and find workable remedies for ...

keySolution: one effective way to deal with this is ...
a sensible solution would be to ...
the best way to tackle this is ...

stance: as far as I can judge,
verdict: these problems can be solved through determined action.
with the right measures, ... can be effectively addressed.
a combination of these solutions would greatly improve the situation.
such steps would go a long way towards resolving ...

aim: Hence, it is vital to examine the main causes and their resulting effects on ...
Therefore, it is important to consider why ... happens and what follows from it.
Consequently, this essay will explore the causes of ... and the impact they have.
Therefore, it is essential to understand both the roots and the consequences of ...

keyCause: one of the main causes of ... is ...
a major reason why ... occurs is ...
keyEffect: the main effect of this is that ...
this has a serious impact on ...
the most significant result of this is ...

stance: as far as I can judge,
verdict: understanding these causes is essential to addressing the effects of ...
the consequences of ... are far-reaching and demand attention.
these factors together explain why ... has such an impact.
tackling the causes is the only way to reduce the effects of ...

aim: Hence, in this essay I will explain why I largely agree with this statement.
Therefore, I intend to argue that ... is, on balance, true.
Consequently, I will set out the reasons for my view on ...
Therefore, this essay will defend the position that ...

keyArg: the strongest reason for my view is that ...
a powerful point in support of this is that ...
what convinces me most is that ...
keyCounter: it could be argued that the opposite is true, since ...
admittedly, there is a case that ...

stance: it seems clear to me that
I remain of the view that
verdict: I agree that ... far more than I disagree.
the arguments in favour clearly outweigh the objections.
despite the counterarguments, my position on ... stands.
on balance, the statement about ... holds true.

aim: Hence, I would like to present my views on ...
Therefore, in this essay I will explain my opinion regarding ...
Consequently, I intend to set out my personal view of ...
Therefore, this essay will make clear where I stand on ...

keyArg: my first reason for thinking so is that ...
another point that supports my view is that ...
what matters most to me is that ...

stance: it seems clear to me that
verdict: my view on ... remains firm.
for these reasons, I strongly support ...
everything points to the conclusion that ...
I have no doubt that ... is the right view.

aim: Hence, it is worth considering how ... is likely to develop in the years ahead.
Therefore, this essay will speculate on the future of ... and the trends shaping it.
Consequently, it is interesting to predict what may happen to ...
Therefore, it is vital to look at where ... might be heading.

keyTrend: there is a growing tendency for ...
an increasingly common development is that ...
keyPredict: in the future, it is likely that ...

stance: it is reasonable to expect that
as far as I can judge,
verdict: the coming years will almost certainly bring change to ...
these trends suggest a very different future for ...
much depends on how ... is handled from here.
whatever happens, ... is unlikely to stay the same.
